name: Vanuatu
headline: Vanuatu CARRY-FORWARD CONFIRMATION at 35.9 / Developing — rotation backfill cycle. Scanner labeled 'never-assessed' but verified countries.json baseline is 35.9 / Developing. UNGA climate-obligations resolution scheduled May 20 — broad co-sponsorship (Netherlands, Kenya, Sierra Leone, Singapore, Barbados, Marshall Islands, Micronesia, Palau, Jamaica, Philippines, Burkina Faso). US actively pressured Vanuatu to withdraw — Vanuatu refused. Vote outcome not yet confirmed in May 18 scan window. Pre-vote carry-forward at 35.9; full assessment scheduled post-vote (May 20-21). If resolution passes: ACC-positive forward signal (Pacific leadership on existential climate threat). If US blocks or withdraws: forward signal for US assessment.

ACC.rationale: Sustained. Pending UNGA vote outcome — if resolution passes, ACC-positive forward signal documented for next cycle.

INT.rationale: Sustained. I1 consistency-under-pressure: Vanuatu refused US pressure to withdraw resolution — INT-positive signal carried forward.

evidence.summary: Amnesty April 2026: Vanuatu's UNGA resolution operationalizing the ICJ Advisory Opinion on climate change obligations — broad co-sponsorship.

Climate Change News May 2026: US actively pressured Vanuatu to withdraw resolution; Vanuatu refused.
Scanner labeled never-assessed; countries.json verified baseline 35.9 / Developing.

keyEvidence: UNGA climate-obligations resolution scheduled May 20 — broad co-sponsorship.
US pressured Vanuatu to withdraw — Vanuatu refused.
Resolution affirms just transition, legal entitlements for sea-level-rise countries, reparation duty.
Confirm at 35.9 pre-vote; full assessment post-vote (May 20-21).
rationale: Rotation backfill confirmation. Pre-vote position at 35.9. UNGA resolution outcome will trigger next-cycle assessment. Math: (2.5+2.5+2.5+2+2.5+2.5+2.5+2.5)/8 = 19.5/8 = 2.4375 → ((2.4375-1)/4)*100 = 35.94 → 35.9.
watches: US response (vote-against vs abstain vs block)
carryForward: UNGA resolution sponsorship (Pacific small-state climate leadership)
boundaryWatchResolution: Not a boundary case. 35.9 sits 5.1pt below Developing/Functional (40/41) and 15.9pt above Critical/Developing (20/21).

math_check.validator_check: Math clean. Carry-forward confirmation. Post-vote re-assessment scheduled.
